CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Approved'), '✅ Approved', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Rejected'), '❌ Rejected', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'In Review'), '⏳ In Review', '🆕 New')))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Visual indicators of the application approval status
CustomField.label: Approval Status
